selections.name: Night Striker
selections.reason: Top speed and class figures in this field. Draws the rail and should get a great trip.

selections.name: Switchin' To Glide
selections.reason: Consistent speed figures and strong recent form. Should be pressing the pace.

selections.name: Devil's Tongue
selections.reason: Solid class rating and capable of closing late on the synthetic surface.

selections.name: Friendly
selections.reason: Outside draw keeps him out of trouble; has enough late kick to hit the board.

danger_horse.name: Clear Position
danger_horse.reason: Jockey change and weight adjustment could spark improvement at a price.

selections.name: Quiet Maddelena
selections.reason: Excellent recent speed figures and draws the inside post for a ground-saving trip.

selections.name: Mitole Power
selections.reason: Very consistent class and speed ratings; will be right there at the wire.

selections.name: Blazing Sky
selections.reason: Weight adjusted to 115 lbs; has the tactical speed to stalk and pounce.

selections.name: Shamra
selections.reason: Capable of popping a big figure on her best day; good value underneath.

danger_horse.name: Forest B
danger_horse.reason: Veteran mare who knows how to win; dangerous if the pace collapses.

selections.name: Zo Lee
selections.reason: Elite speed figures and strong class rating; looks like a standout in this spot.

selections.name: Shifty
selections.reason: High class rating and draws the rail; will be a major factor throughout.

selections.name: Luz De La Luna
selections.reason: Consistent performer with solid speed figures; fits well in this group.

selections.name: War Signal
selections.reason: Good tactical speed and should get a clean trip from the outside post.

selections.name: Sobiech
selections.reason: Strong class rating for this level and has shown good early speed.

selections.name: Save The Date
selections.reason: Consistent form and draws well outside to avoid early traffic.

selections.name: Sultry Sophie
selections.reason: Inside draw and solid speed figures make her a strong contender.

selections.name: Serenading Amaya
selections.reason: Capable of closing late if the pace gets hot up front.

danger_horse.name: Rookie Court
danger_horse.reason: Longshot with some hidden form that could hit the board at a price.

selections.name: Tequilasoupernova
selections.reason: Top class and speed figures; rail draw is perfect for her running style.

selections.name: Bound To Be True
selections.reason: Very consistent and has the tactical speed to stay close to the pace.

selections.name: Bedazzle Me
selections.reason: Solid speed figures and should get a good stalking trip from the outside.

selections.name: Bedtime
selections.reason: Good class rating and can be a factor if she runs back to her best form.

danger_horse.name: Enchanted Forest
danger_horse.reason: Weight adjusted to 115 lbs; has the ability to surprise if the pace is right.

selections.name: Pageant Queen
selections.reason: Strong class rating and draws the rail; should be tough to beat with a clean break.

selections.name: Sipping History
selections.reason: Consistent speed figures and outside draw gives her tactical options.

selections.name: Souper Sporty
selections.reason: Solid class rating and has shown good early speed in recent starts.

selections.name: Alluring Amy
selections.reason: Capable of a strong late run and fits well in this field.

selections.name: Nonna's Love
selections.reason: Massive speed and class advantage over this field; looks like a single.

selections.name: Day To Day
selections.reason: Strong recent form and solid speed figures make her the logical alternative.

selections.name: Mony Mony
selections.reason: Consistent performer who should be in the mix for the exotics.

selections.name: Likely Story
selections.reason: Outside draw and good tactical speed; can hit the board.

selections.name: World Showcase
selections.reason: Weight adjusted to 115 lbs; top speed and class figures in a wide-open race.

selections.name: Lemoncella Spritz
selections.reason: Solid class rating and should get a good trip from the inside post.

selections.name: Mrs. Hot Shot
selections.reason: Consistent form and capable of hitting the board at a decent price.

selections.name: Mardene
selections.reason: Has shown enough speed in the past to be competitive here.

danger_horse.name: No Visor
danger_horse.reason: Outside draw could keep her out of trouble; dangerous if she gets loose.
